description: Skill lifecycle and integrity rules. 10 rules governing skill loading, verification, sandbox capability enforcement, and lifecycle transitions.

rules.description: NEVER load a skill whose SHA-256 signature does not match the manifest or whose signature verification fails
rules.requirement: verify_signatures == true and signature_valid == true and hash_matches_manifest == true
rules.rationale: Unsigned or tampered skills are the primary supply chain attack vector

rules.description: NEVER allow a skill to request capabilities beyond its declared manifest
rules.rationale: Capability escalation enables sandbox escape and privilege abuse

rules.description: ALWAYS verify TUF/Sigstore signatures on skill packages before registration
rules.rationale: Cryptographic provenance ensures skills come from trusted publishers

rules.description: NEVER allow skills to self-modify or update their own code or configuration
rules.rationale: Self-modifying skills bypass the registry's integrity controls

rules.description: ALWAYS enforce the 3-skill concurrency ceiling for L2-L8 skills
rules.rationale: Concurrency ceiling prevents resource exhaustion and complexity explosion

rules.description: ALWAYS validate skill dependencies are satisfied before activation
rules.rationale: Missing dependencies cause runtime failures that may bypass safety checks

rules.description: NEVER allow L0 enforcement skills to be unloaded during an active session
rules.rationale: Unloading L0 skills during a session completely disables safety

rules.description: ALWAYS log skill lifecycle transitions (REGISTERED→LOADED→ACTIVE→UNLOADED→PURGED) with timestamps
rules.rationale: Lifecycle audit trail enables forensic analysis of skill activity

rules.description: NEVER load skills from untrusted sources or without provenance chain
rules.rationale: Skills from untrusted sources may contain malicious code or backdoors

rules.description: ALWAYS purge skill artifacts and temporary data when a skill is PURGED
rules.requirement: artifacts_deleted == true and temp_data_cleared == true and cache_invalidated == true
rules.rationale: Prevents data leakage between sessions through residual skill state
